name: io.github.yunjiefanresearch-hub/cbsr
description: Typed query tools over the Cross-Border Stablecoin Register: twelve jurisdictions across fifteen dimensions of stablecoin regulation, a directed corridor layer (132 directed corridors — the same border can be permissive one way and restricted the other), a computed feasibility engine with as_of time travel, and a lawyer-citable subset. No network calls; no synthesis.

register.name: Cross-Border Stablecoin Register (CBSR)
register.evidence_rule: citable = claim_class:tier1_legal AND status:in_force AND evidence_tier:resolution_text
